mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, m.id AS member_id, m.username, m.nickname, m.mobile, IFNULL(s.consume_amount, 0) AS consume_amount, IFNULL(s.coupon_amount, 0) AS coupon_amount, IFNULL(s.order_count, 0) AS order_count, IFNULL(s.coupon_count, 0) AS coupon_count, IFNULL(s.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, IFNULL(s.return_order_count, 0) AS return_order_count, IFNULL(s.login_count, 0) AS login_count, IFNULL(s.attend_count, 0) AS attend_count, IFNULL(s.fans_count, 0) AS fans_count, IFNULL(s.collect_product_count, 0) AS collect_product_count, IFNULL(s.collect_subject_count, 0) AS collect_subject_count, IFNULL(s.collect_comment_count, 0) AS collect_comment_count, IFNULL(s.invite_friend_count, 0) AS invite_friend_count FROM ums_member m LEFT JOIN ums_member_statistics_info s ON s.member_id = m.id
AND m.id = #{query.memberId}
AND m.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.username}, '%')
AND m.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.mobile}, '%')
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC, m.id DESC
